mxfile.agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/139.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

mxCell.value:
if down payment, architectural project
u: get loan approval

if ID number, estimated loan budget
u: edit loan request for package x
d: best recommendation for your case
d: new recommendation for your case
Simulate analysis for my exact budget y
u: change the outcome and show me the corresponding input, recommendation, and explanation
d: generating loan contract n% concluded

view explanation{
  d: loan approved of 50% higher than budget y
  d: confidence level of 95%
  d: feature contribution to my recommendation}
Conversation opening point: Use this element to represent any points where the user can enter into the system.
Conversation ending point: Use this element to represent any points where the user can finish the conversation and exit the system.
d: Are you sure to delete the current loan proposal?

view similar projects{
  d: projects A, B, and C have a similar   prediction as project Y
 d: confidence level for each project
 d: feature contribution for each  prediction}

if additional explanation requested{
  d: textual explanation for my       prediction}

%3CmxGraphModel%3E%3Croot%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%220%22%2F%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%221%22%20parent%3D%220%22%2F%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%222%22%20value%3D%22%22%20style%3D%22group%22%20vertex%3D%221%22%20connectable%3D%220%22%20parent%3D%221%22%3E%3CmxGeometry%20x%3D%22-800%22%20y%3D%22980%22%20width%3D%22310%22%20height%3D%2260%22%20as%3D%22geometry%22%2F%3E%3C%2FmxCell%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%223%22%20value%3D%22Title%22%20style%3D%22swimlane%3Bhtml%3D1%3BfontStyle%3D0%3BchildLayout%3DstackLayout%3Bhorizontal%3D1%3BstartSize%3D26%3BfillColor%3Dnone%3BhorizontalStack%3D0%3BresizeParent%3D1%3BresizeLast%3D0%3Bcollapsible%3D1%3BmarginBottom%3D0%3BswimlaneFillColor%3D%23ffffff%3Brounded%3D1%3Bglass%3D0%3Bdashed%3D1%3BstrokeColor%3Dlight-dark(%233333ff%2C%20%23ededed)%3B%22%20vertex%3D%221%22%20parent%3D%222%22%3E%3CmxGeometry%20width%3D%22310%22%20height%3D%2260%22%20as%3D%22geometry%22%3E%3CmxRectangle%20x%3D%22230%22%20y%3D%22280%22%20width%3D%22120%22%20height%3D%2226%22%20as%3D%22alternateBounds%22%2F%3E%3C%2FmxGeometry%3E%3C%2FmxCell%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%224%22%20value%3D%22d%2Bu%3A%20confirmation%22%20style%3D%22text%3Bhtml%3D1%3BstrokeColor%3Dnone%3BfillColor%3Dnone%3Balign%3Dleft%3BverticalAlign%3Dtop%3BspacingLeft%3D4%3BspacingRight%3D4%3BwhiteSpace%3Dwrap%3Boverflow%3Dhidden%3Brotatable%3D0%3Bpoints%3D%5B%5B0%2C0.5%5D%2C%5B1%2C0.5%5D%5D%3BportConstraint%3Deastwest%3Bdashed%3D1%3B%22%20vertex%3D%221%22%20parent%3D%223%22%3E%3CmxGeometry%20y%3D%2226%22%20width%3D%22310%22%20height%3D%2234%22%20as%3D%22geometry%22%2F%3E%3C%2FmxCell%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%225%22%20value%3D%22%22%20style%3D%22shape%3Dimage%3Bhtml%3D1%3BverticalAlign%3Dtop%3BverticalLabelPosition%3Dbottom%3BlabelBackgroundColor%3D%23ffffff%3BimageAspect%3D0%3Baspect%3Dfixed%3Bimage%3Dhttps%3A%2F%2Fcdn0.iconfinder.com%2Fdata%2Ficons%2Fphosphor-regular-vol-3%2F256%2Fnote-pencil-128.png%3Bcontainer%3D0%3B%22%20vertex%3D%221%22%20parent%3D%222%22%3E%3CmxGeometry%20x%3D%2222%22%20y%3D%222%22%20width%3D%2218.375%22%20height%3D%2218.375%22%20as%3D%22geometry%22%2F%3E%3C%2FmxCell%3E%3C%2Froot%3E%3C%2FmxGraphModel%3E%3CmxGraphModel%3E%3Croot%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%220%22%2F%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%221%22%20parent%3D%220%22%2F%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%222%22%20value%3D%22%22%20style%3D%22group%22%20vertex%3D%221%22%20connectable%3D%220%22%20parent%3D%221%22%3E%3CmxGeometry%20x%3D%22-800%22%20y%3D%22980%22%20width%3D%22310%22%20height%3D%2260%22%20as%3D%22geometry%22%2F%3E%3C%2FmxCell%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%223%22%20value%3D%22Title%22%20style%3D%22swimlane%3Bhtml%3D1%3BfontStyle%3D0%3BchildLayout%3DstackLayout%3Bhorizontal%3D1%3BstartSize%3D26%3BfillColor%3Dnone%3BhorizontalStack%3D0%3BresizeParent%3D1%3BresizeLast%3D0%3Bcollapsible%3D1%3BmarginBottom%3D0%3BswimlaneFillColor%3D%23ffffff%3Brounded%3D1%3Bglass%3D0%3Bdashed%3D1%3BstrokeColor%3Dlight-dark(%233333ff%2C%20%23ededed)%3B%22%20vertex%3D%221%22%20parent%3D%222%22%3E%3CmxGeometry%20width%3D%22310%22%20height%3D%2260%22%20as%3D%22geometry%22%3E%3CmxRectangle%20x%3D%22230%22%20y%3D%22280%22%20width%3D%22120%22%20height%3D%2226%22%20as%3D%22alternateBounds%22%2F%3E%3C%2FmxGeometry%3E%3C%2FmxCell%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%224%22%20value%3D%22d%2Bu%3A%20confirmation%22%20style%3D%22text%3Bhtml%3D1%3BstrokeColor%3Dnone%3BfillColor%3Dnone%3Balign%3Dleft%3BverticalAlign%3Dtop%3BspacingLeft%3D4%3BspacingRight%3D4%3BwhiteSpace%3Dwrap%3Boverflow%3Dhidden%3Brotatable%3D0%3Bpoints%3D%5B%5B0%2C0.5%5D%2C%5B1%2C0.5%5D%5D%3BportConstraint%3Deastwest%3Bdashed%3D1%3B%22%20vertex%3D%221%22%20parent%3D%223%22%3E%3CmxGeometry%20y%3D%2226%22%20width%3D%22310%22%20height%3D%2234%22%20as%3D%22geometry%22%2F%3E%3C%2FmxCell%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%225%22%20value%3D%22%22%20style%3D%22shape%3Dimage%3Bhtml%3D1%3BverticalAlign%3Dtop%3BverticalLabelPosition%3Dbottom%3BlabelBackgroundColor%3D%23ffffff%3BimageAspect%3D0%3Baspect%3Dfixed%3Bimage%3Dhttps%3A%2F%2Fcdn0.iconfinder.com%2Fdata%2Ficons%2Fphosphor-regular-vol-3%2F256%2Fnote-pencil-128.png%3Bcontainer%3D0%3B%22%20vertex%3D%221%22%20parent%3D%222%22%3E%3CmxGeometry%20x%3D%2222%22%20y%3D%222%22%20width%3D%2218.375%22%20height%3D%2218.375%22%20as%3D%22geometry%22%2F%3E%3C%2FmxCell%3E%3C%2Froot%3E%3C%2FmxGraphModel%3E

Scene: Use this element to represent a conversation between the user and the designer regarding one topic to advance a certain goal (the topic at the scene upper part) and perhaps exchange data (the dialog at the scene bottom part). When the user has to provide an input, we use the prefix d+u.

view available packages{
  d: list (available packages)}

List: Use this dialog structure when the designer wants to provide a set of predefined options to be chosen by the user. The number of items the user can select is specified through the structure choose. For example:

d: choose (1~5, list (available packages))

Alert scene: Use this element to represent a situation where the designer can anticipate a potential cause of communication breakdown. For example, before deleting a file, the designer can ask a confirmation from the user.

AI-generated content scene: Use this element to represent scene which its content was generated through an artificial intelligence mechanism. For example, this type of scene can be used to explicitly express the content of an explanation generate for an XAI recommendation.

The explanation type (feature contribution, example-based, counterfactual) can be detailed in the scene dialog. For example:

d: feature contribution to my recommendation

view explanation{
  d: loan approved of 50% higher than    budget y
  d: confidence level of 95%
  d: feature contribution to my       recommendation}
d: Are you sure you want to change the estimated loan budget?

AI-generated alert scene: Use this element to represent an alert scene that its content was generate by AI. For instance, a situation where the anticipation of a communication breakdown was predicted by an AI algorithm.

Selective explanation scene: Use this element to explicitly represent an explanation interactive mechanism from the selective type, such as give additional explanations on demand, organize the explanation parameters, or filter inputs.

Mutable explanation scene: Use this element to explicitly represent an explanation interactive mechanism from the mutable type, such as change the AI model parameters or the inputs and show to the user the corresponding prediction and explanation, as well as show explanation for similar inputs.

Dialogic explanation alert scene: Use this element to represent an alert scene which is an explanation interactive mechanism from the dialogic type. For instance, when the user wants to provide feedback for an XAI recommendation and see the corresponding results from the new processing.
User’s utterance: Use this element to represent any conversation started by the user.
Designer’s utterance: Use this element to represent any answer/conversation started by the designer.
User’s repair utterance: Use this element to represent a situation where the user gave up on certain goal/objective, such as a “cancel” action.
Global topic shift: Use this element to represent that a scene can be triggered/started at any moment in the interaction.

System process: Use these elements to represent a moment in the interaction that the system has to do a processing, such as a search on a database. The second option can be used to represent feedback from the designer, such as loading stats.

AI system process: Use these elements to represent a moment in the interaction that the system process is made by an AI algorithm, such provide the best file available on a database. Also, the second option can be used to represent feedback from the designer, such as loading stats.
